description: Single close-up photo of brown patch fungal disease on bermuda in Atlanta. Tests that the AI correctly identifies Rhizoctonia solani (brown patch) and recommends appropriate fungicide treatment.

photos.caption: Close-up of bermuda turf showing characteristic circular brown patch lesion with a darker smoke ring border at the perimeter, bleached tan center, and healthy green grass outside the ring.

profile.notes: Circular brown patch appeared suddenly over the last 3 days. Patch is about 2 feet across with a darker ring at the edge.
profile.currentRoutine: Mow at 1.5 inches, water 3x per week. No recent fungicide applications.

groundTruth.photoNotes: Single close-up showing a circular Rhizoctonia brown patch lesion approximately 2 feet in diameter on bermuda turf. Characteristic smoke ring border is visible at the lesion edge. Center is bleached tan; surrounding grass is green and healthy.
